properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As for me and my house We will serve You Lord Lifting holy hands in worship We will not bow down to the gods of men We will worship the God of Israel

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are holy, holy There is no one else like you You are holy, holy There is no one else like you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Choose this day whom you will serve Choose this day whom you will serve As for me and my house We will serve You Lord, we will serve You Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We will not bow to the gods of men, We will not bow to the gods of men We'll worship the God of Israel

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Kadosh, kasoh Ata Ein kamocha Adonai Kadosh, kasoh Ata Ein kamocha Adonai
